## What does this PR do?

<!-- A brief description of the change -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation only
- [ ] `chore:` Maintenance (no release)
- [ ] `refactor:` Code change, no behaviour change

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (lowercase `feat:`, `fix:`, etc.)
- [ ] `bats tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `shellcheck` passes locally (`shellcheck bloat-be-gone.sh bin/bgb install.sh update.sh uninstall.sh`)
- [ ] This PR targets `dev`, not `main` (unless it's a `dev` → `main` release PR)
